# Supervisor-Skills

> A PhD-level academic research methodology distilled into eight structured skills, covering the full paper lifecycle (idea evaluation, introduction drafting, technical paper structuring, benchmark paper structuring, figure design, pre-submission review, rebuttal drafting, AI-assisted research workflow). Usable as a standalone Chinese curriculum at `handbook/`, as an English mirror at `docs/en/handbook/`, or as plugin skills under `plugins/phd-research/skills/`.

Target audience: researchers writing papers for NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, VLDB, SIGMOD, KDD, ACL, EMNLP, CVPR, and similar top venues.

## Install

Paste the following prompt into your AI assistant:

```
Help me install Supervisor-Skills from https://github.com/HKUSTDial/Supervisor-Skills with Skills.
```

See [README.md](README.md) (Chinese) or [README.en.md](README.en.md) for full details.

## Skills (v2.0.0)

Eight anchor skills under `plugins/phd-research/skills/` cover the full paper lifecycle.

- [idea-evaluator](plugins/phd-research/skills/idea-evaluator/SKILL.md): scores a research idea on the five-dimension framework (Higher / Faster / Stronger / Cheaper / Broader) plus lifecycle-capability matching, fatal-flaws audit, and paradigm-shift probe.
- [vibe-research-workflow](plugins/phd-research/skills/vibe-research-workflow/SKILL.md): Vibe Coding, Vibe Figure, Vibe Writing tool choice and six behavioral rules for AI-assisted research.
- [intro-drafter](plugins/phd-research/skills/intro-drafter/SKILL.md): six-paragraph Introduction outline from a structured flowchart.
- [tech-paper-template](plugins/phd-research/skills/tech-paper-template/SKILL.md): technical-paper thinking table with four self-consistency checks and Technique vs New Problem positioning.
- [benchmark-paper-template](plugins/phd-research/skills/benchmark-paper-template/SKILL.md): benchmark-paper five-pillar audit, six-part Introduction logic chain, Section 2-7 skeleton, and pre-submission checklist.
- [figure-designer](plugins/phd-research/skills/figure-designer/SKILL.md): paradigm selection and quality audit for motivated-example, solution-overview, and experimental-results figures.
- [pre-submission-reviewer](plugins/phd-research/skills/pre-submission-reviewer/SKILL.md): five-dimension reviewer self-check covering macro logic, writing detail, grammar, LaTeX format, and figure quality.
- [rebuttal-drafter](plugins/phd-research/skills/rebuttal-drafter/SKILL.md): point-by-point reviewer-response package with meta.tex, r1/r2/r3.tex, and \revision{blue} markup per handbook 3.5.

## Reader curriculum

The original Chinese curriculum by the methodology author lives at `handbook/`. An English mirror lives at `docs/en/handbook/`. Both are organized into six chapters.

- `handbook/01_Preliminary/` — evaluating paper quality from a reviewer's perspective.
- `handbook/02_Idea_Generation/` — idea lifecycle, five-dimension thinking, disruptive innovation.
- `handbook/03_Paper_Writing/` — paper lifecycle, Introduction flowchart, technical and benchmark templates, writing checklist.
- `handbook/04_Scientific_Plotting/` — motivated, overview, experimental figures and a drawing checklist.
- `handbook/05_Vibe_Research/` — AI-assisted research workflow and practitioner notes.
- `handbook/06_Case_Studies/` — Alpha-SQL (ICML 2025), AFlow (ICLR 2025), LEAD (VLDB 2026) Introduction analyses.
